description: Control-flow enrichment: condition_tests, paren_depth, for_style, mixed_logic, dup_logic, has_assignment_in_condition, has_catch_all/catch_all_kind. Grounded on forgeql-pub.frozen (Rust source + C/C++ fixtures).

cases.name: condition_tests_high
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/ast/enrich/control_flow.rs' WHERE fql_kind='if' WHERE condition_tests=6 ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 20

cases.name: paren_depth_nested
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-lang-rust/src/macro_expand.rs' WHERE fql_kind='if' WHERE paren_depth=3 ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 20

cases.name: for_style_range
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/ast/enrich/control_flow.rs' WHERE fql_kind='for' WHERE for_style='range' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 100

cases.name: for_style_traditional
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='for' WHERE for_style='traditional' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 100

cases.name: mixed_logic
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='if' WHERE mixed_logic='true' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 100

cases.name: dup_logic
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/enrichment_patterns.cpp' WHERE dup_logic='true' WHERE enclosing_fn='dupLogicPatterns' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 20

cases.name: has_assignment_in_condition
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/enrichment_patterns.cpp' WHERE fql_kind='if' WHERE has_assignment_in_condition='true' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 20

cases.name: has_catch_all_default
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='switch' WHERE has_catch_all='true' WHERE catch_all_kind='default' LIMIT 100

cases.name: negative_no_assignment_in_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='if' WHERE has_assignment_in_condition='true' LIMIT 5

cases.name: negative_no_dup_logic_in_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE dup_logic='true' LIMIT 5
